zh.West Hanningfield, Essex, England: 英國艾可韋斯特 韓寧費爾德
zh.Beddington, Surrey, England: 英國英格蘭素瑞貝丁頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Carew於1489年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，她的父親Sir Richard Carew of Beddington20歲，母親Malyn Oxenbridge16歲。她於大約1507年與Sir William Pelham I在英國艾可韋斯特 韓寧費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1523年在英國素可享年34歲。

zh-hans.West Hanningfield, Essex, England: 英国艾可韋斯特 韓寧費爾德
zh-hans.Beddington, Surrey, England: 英国英格兰素瑞貝丁頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Carew于1489年出生在英国英格兰艾可时，她的父亲Sir Richard Carew of Beddington20岁，母亲Malyn Oxenbridge16岁。她于大约1507年与Sir William Pelham I在英国艾可韋斯特 韓寧費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1523年在英国素可享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, James Patrick, Kieran.

Welsh (Pembrokeshire): habitational name from any of various minor places in Wales, in particular one near Pembroke with a major castle, named from Welsh caer ‘fort’ + rhiw ‘hill, slope’. The surname was taken to Ireland soon after the Norman invasion of England and was Gaelicized as de Carrún. In the 16th century a family called Carew from Devon played an important part in establishing the Tudor administration in Ireland.
Cornish (Somerset and Devon): from the cognate Cornish word kerrow (plural of ker ‘fort’), which occurs seven times as a placename in Cornwall.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Carew was born in 1489, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Carew of Beddington, was 20 and her mother, Malyn Oxenbridge, was 16. She married Sir William Pelham I about 1507, in West Hanningfield, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1523, in Sussex, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Carew est née en 1489, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Carew of Beddington, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Malyn Oxenbridge, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Pelham I environ 1507, à West Hanningfield, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1523, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Carew 1489 in Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Carew of Beddington 20 und ihre Mutter Malyn Oxenbridge 16. Sie hat um 1507 in West Hanningfield, Essex, England Sir William Pelham I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1523 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Carew è nata il nel 1489 nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Richard Carew of Beddington, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Malyn Oxenbridge, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Pelham I circa 1507, nel West Hanningfield, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1523, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Carewが1489年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Carew of Beddingtonは20歳，母Malyn Oxenbridgeは16歳であった。約1507年にイギリスエセックスウエスト ハニングフィールドでSir William Pelham Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1523年にイギリススセックスで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Carew(이)가 1489년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Carew of Beddington(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Malyn Oxenbridge(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1507년 영국 에세스 웨스트 해닝필드에서 Sir William Pelham I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1523년 영국 수세스에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Carew nasceu em 1489, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Carew of Beddington, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Malyn Oxenbridge, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Pelham I aproximadamente 1507, em West Hanningfield, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1523, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Carew родилась в 1489 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Carew of Beddington было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Malyn Oxenbridge, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Pelham I около 1507 г. в местности вест ханнингфиелд, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1523 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Carew nació en 1489, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Carew of Beddington, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Malyn Oxenbridge, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir William Pelham I aproximadamente 1507, en West Hanningfield, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1523, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años.
